file_structure.description: Helm template for all required Kubernetes Namespaces with labels.
CloudNative-PG Cluster CR for sigma1-postgres with initdb and extensions.
Kubernetes Job for post-cluster schema and role initialization.
Opstree Valkey (Redis) CR for sigma1-valkey instance.
Helm template for all nine Kubernetes Secrets in sigma1 namespace.
PVC, Pod/Deployment, and Service for Signal-CLI in signal namespace.
ConfigMap aggregating all connection strings for downstream services.
ArgoCD Application CR for sigma1/infra Helm chart.
Example Helm values file showing required secret keys.

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test checklist for infra provisioning
# 1. kubectl get namespaces sigma1 databases openclaw signal
# 2. kubectl get cluster sigma1-postgres -n databases
# 3. kubectl get pods -n databases
# 4. psql -U sigma1_user -d sigma1 -c '\dn'
# 5. redis-cli -h sigma1-valkey.databases.svc.cluster.local -p 6379 ping
# 6. kubectl get secret -n sigma1
# 7. kubectl get pod -n signal
# 8. kubectl get configmap sigma1-infra-endpoints -n sigma1 -o yaml
# 9. ArgoCD app status: Synced/Healthy

file_structure.description: Helm template for four Namespaces: sigma1, databases, openclaw, signal.

scaffolds.test_stubs:
